betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Auxiliary Cooling Tower§f dissipates heat from industrial cooling loops.

§eTask:§f Craft 1x §bSmall Cooling Tower§f (machine_tower_small)

§eFunction:§f
• Removes heat from cooling water circuits
• Essential for industrial-scale heat management
• Smaller than the large cooling tower but useful for compact setups

§eSetup:§f
• Connect to cooling water loops
• Place in well-ventilated area for best performance
• Monitor water temperatures

§eUse Cases:§f
• Industrial machine cooling
• Heat exchanger support
• Backup cooling for main systems

§aTip:§f Add more towers if temperatures rise too high.
